name: BOYD GAMING CORP
business: Boyd Gaming Corporation operates 27 brick-and-mortar gaming entertainment properties in 11 U.S. states, an online casino gaming business (Boyd Interactive) offering B2B and B2C services, and manages Sky River Casino for Wilton Rancheria. It also provides online sports wagering through market access agreements in several states. The majority of revenues come from gaming operations.

exposures.sentence: We derive the majority of our revenues from gaming at our gaming entertainment properties and Lattner, which generated approximately 64% and 66% of our revenues in 2025 and 2024, respectively.

catalysts.event: Opening of transitional casino in Norfolk, Virginia
catalysts.sentence: On November 7, 2025, the Company, as developer and manager, opened a transitional casino in Norfolk, Virginia.

catalysts.event: Permanent casino resort expected opening in Norfolk, Virginia
catalysts.sentence: The permanent casino resort is expected to open in late 2027.

catalysts.event: Permanent closure of Sam's Town Tunica property
catalysts.sentence: On November 9, 2025, the Company permanently closed the Sam's Town Tunica property.

catalysts.event: Sale of FanDuel equity interest closed
catalysts.sentence: On July 31, 2025, pursuant to the Purchase Agreement, Boyd Interactive Holdings completed the sale of its Equity Interest to Parent for aggregate cash consideration of $1,758.0 million.
Cadence Crossing will feature a 10,000 square foot casino, 450 slots and several restaurants, and is expected to open in late March 2026.

catalysts.event: Sky River Casino first phase expansion completion
catalysts.sentence: The first phase of the expansion will add 400 slots and a 1,600-space parking garage and is expected to be completed in the first quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Sky River Casino second phase expansion completion
catalysts.sentence: The second phase of the expansion will include a 300-room hotel, two additional food and beverage outlets, a day spa, and an entertainment and events center. The second phase is expected to be completed in mid-2027.

catalysts.event: Entry into Amended and Restated Credit Agreement
catalysts.sentence: On January 21, 2026 (the New Closing Date), the Company entered into an Amended and Restated Credit Agreement ...
